description: You are a Second Officer on MV Northern Crown preparing for an early morning transit of the English Channel from the Dover Strait southwestward toward the Channel Islands. Create a complete passage planning exercise scenario in Bridge Command by establishing a scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/o) Dover Channel Transit containing the necessary configuration files. The environment.ini must specify Setting='English Channel East', StartTime=5.5, Weather=4.0, VisibilityRange=8.0, StartMonth=11, and StartYear=2024. Configure ownship.ini for 'MV Northern Crown' at Dover Strait coordinates (Lat ~51.05-51.15, Long ~1.20-1.40) with a heading of ~220, speed of 12 knots, and enabled GPS and depth sounder. Populate othership.ini with exactly 5 traffic vessels (container ship, tanker, ferry, cross-channel ferry, fishing vessel, and sailing yacht), each with 2-3 waypoint legs and realistic speeds. Set bc5.ini parameters to full_radar=1, max_radar_range=72, radar_angular_resolution=720, and hide_instruments=0. Additionally, produce a passage plan document at /home/ga/Documents/passage_plan.txt detailing the vessel name, departure/destination, a planned route with at least 4 waypoints, estimated speed, expected hazards (TSS, traffic, weather), and a communication plan (VHF channels). Login: ga / password123.
